title: EndingLibrary
body:
![LOADER FORGE](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Forge-ecebe6?labelColor=B446C6&style=for-the-badge) ![AVAILABLE 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available-1.20.1-ecebe6?labelColor=B446C6&style=for-the-badge) 
![Main Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adc712c3602ec90da72c7dadec226e9f70fbd895_0.webp)
This mod is a universal library for mods created by [MegaDarkness](https://modrinth.com/user/MegaDarkness), providing common code to avoid unnecessary duplication and reimplementation.

Additionally, it ports certain features from newer versions of Minecraft (>1.20.1)(such as [Item Components](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Item_components)),and introduces additional commands.
